proof_statement: The load-bearing D=18 integer anchor is the H_3 Shephard-Todd invariant-degree sum. D_face_int = face_dim + (ambient_dim - face_dim) = ambient_dim = 6. A 2D surface in R^6 has exactly 6 independent deformation modes as a 6D tangent-bundle consistency check. The headline coefficient c = -D/N = -3.6 is Tier 3 pending O.26b.
